procedure.name: GetOrgItemHierarchy
procedure.text:
create or replace function GetOrgItemHierarchy(&&StartItemId&& bigint) returns table(&&OrgItemId&& bigint, &&Lvl&& bigint, &&UserId&& bigint) as $$
with recursive t_Rec as ( select oi.&&Id&&, oi.&&Parentitem&&, 0 as &&Lvl&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi where oi.&&IsDeleted&& = 0 and oi.&&Id&& = $1
union all
select oit.&&Id&&, oit.&&ParentItem&&, t_Rec.&&Lvl&& + 1 as &&Lvl&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oit inner join t_Rec on t_Rec.&&ParentItem&& = oit.&&Id&& and oit.&&IsDeleted&& = 0 )
select t_Rec.&&Id&& as &&OrgItemId&&, cast(t_Rec.&&Lvl&& as bigint) as &&Lvl&&, ussc.&&UserId&& as &&UserId&& from t_Rec left join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& ussc on t_Rec.&&Id&& = ussc.&&OrgItemId&& where t_Rec.&&Id&& != $1 and ussc.&&UserCount&& != -1 and ussc.&&OrgItemId&& is not null
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetOrgItemChilds
procedure.text:
create or replace function GetOrgItemChilds(&&StartItemId&& bigint) returns table (&&OrgItemId&& bigint, &&Lvl&& bigint) as $$
with recursive t_Rec as ( select oi.&&Id&&, oi.&&ParentItem&&, 0 as &&Lvl&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi where oi.&&IsDeleted&&=0 and oi.&&Id&& = $1
union all
select oit.&&Id&&, oit.&&ParentItem&&, t_Rec.&&Lvl&& + 1 as &&Lvl&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oit inner join t_Rec on t_Rec.&&Id&& = oit.&&ParentItem&& and oit.&&IsDeleted&&=0 )
select t_Rec.&&Id&& as &&OrgItemId&&, cast(t_Rec.&&Lvl&& as bigint) as &&Lvl&& from t_Rec
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetUserChiefsHierarchy
OrgStructTree
procedure.text:
create or replace function OrgStructTree() returns table( &&Id&& bigint, &&ItemType&& int, &&Name&& text, &&ParentItem&& bigint, &&Uid&& uuid)
as $$ select oi.&&Id&&, oi.&&ItemType&&, oi.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, oi.&&ParentItem&&, oi.&&Uid&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi where oi.&&IsDeleted&&=0 $$ language sql;

hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
select &&UserId&& from &&UserSecuritySetCache&& where &&GroupId&& in (:groupId)
union
select oid.&&UserId&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oid where oid.&&UserId&& is not null and oid.&&Id&& in (:orgItemId)
union
select oiu.&&UserId&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi inner join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& oiu on oiu.&&OrganizationItemId&&=oi.&&Id&& where oiu.&&UserId&& is not null and oi.&&Id&& in (:orgItemId)

procedure.name: GetDepartmentUsers
procedure.text:
-- список пользователей для элемента оргструктуры create or replace function GetDepartmentUsers(DepartmentId bigint) returns table ( &&UserId&& bigint ) as $$
-- для отдела все поддерево, для должности и группы только сам элемент with recursive AllOrganizationItems as ( -- отделы где является непосредственным начальником select oi.&&Id&&, oi.&&UserId&&, oi.&&ItemType&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi where oi.&&Id&& = $1
union all
-- подчиненные отделы select oi.&&Id&&, oi.&&UserId&&, aoi.&&ItemType&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi inner join AllOrganizationItems aoi on oi.&&ParentItem&& = aoi.&&Id&& and aoi.&&ItemType&& = 0 )
-- начальники всех отделов select aoi.&&UserId&& from AllOrganizationItems aoi where aoi.&&UserId&& is not null
union
select oim.&&UserId&& from AllOrganizationItems aoi inner join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& oim on oim.&&OrganizationItemId&& = aoi.&&Id&&
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetOrganizationItemUsers
procedure.text:
-- список подчиненных для пользователя create or replace function GetOrganizationItemUsers ( &&OrganizationItemId&& bigint ) returns table ( &&UserId&& bigint ) as $$ -- для должностей возвращаем пользователей назначенных на должности select oi.&&UserId&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi where oi.&&ItemType&& = 1 and oi.&&Id&& = $1 and oi.&&UserId&& is not null union select GetDepartmentUsers.&&UserId&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi left join GetDepartmentUsers(oi.&&Id&&) on 1=1 where (oi.&&ItemTyp&&e = 0 or oi.&&ItemType&& = 2) and oi.&&Id&& = $1 and GetDepartmentUsers.&&UserId&& is not null
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetGroupUsers
procedure.text:
create or replace function GetGroupUsers(&&GroupId&& bigint) returns table (&&UserId&& bigint)
as $$
with recursive AllGroups(&&GroupId&&) as ( select g.&&Id&& as &&GroupId&& from &&UserGroup&& g where g.&&Id&& = $1 and g.&&Uid&& != '97D7E638-F957-4964-B991-2B1AEED59163' union all select gm.&&ChildId&& as &&GroupId&& from UserGroup_Groups_Map gm inner join AllGroups ag on ag.&&GroupId&& = gm.&&ParentId&& )
select ugm.&&UserId&& as &&UserId && from AllGroups ag inner join UserGroup_User_Map ugm on ugm.&&GroupId&& = ag.&&GroupId&&
union
select GetOrganizationItemUsers.&&UserId&& as &&UserId&& from AllGroups ag inner join UserGroup_OrgItem_Map oim on oim.&&GroupId&& = ag.&&GroupId&& left join GetOrganizationItemUsers(oim.&&OrgItemId&&) on 1=1
union
select u.&&Id&& as &&UserId && from &&User&& u where u.&&Status&& = 0 and exists (select &&Id&& from &&UserGroup&& where &&Id&& = $1 and &&Uid&& = '97D7E638-F957-4964-B991-2B1AEED59163')
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetGroupsForUsers
procedure.text:
create or replace function GetGroupsForUsers(&&UserId&& bigint) returns table (&&GroupId&& bigint)
as $$
select &&GroupId&& from &&UserSecuritySetCache&& where &&UserId&& = $1 and &&GroupId&& > 0
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetUserChief
procedure.text:
-- список начальников для порльзователя create or replace function GetUserChief(&&Uid&& bigint) returns table (&&UserId&& bigint)
as $$
with recursive AllOrganizationItems as ( -- прямые начальники и отделы в кторых находится пользователль
-- должности пользователя select oi.&&ParentItem&& as &&Id&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi where oi.&&UserId&& = $1 and oi.&&ParentItem&& is not null union -- отделы в которых состоит польователь select poi.&&ParentItem&& as &&Id&& from &&OrganizationItemUsers&& ioum inner join &&OrganizationItem&& poi on poi.&&Id&& = ioum.&&OrganizationItemId&& where ioum.&&UserId&& = $1 and poi.&&ParentItem&& is not null
union all -- начальники начальников и вышестоящие отделы select coi.&&Id&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi inner join AllOrganizationItems aoi on aoi.&&Id&& = oi.&&Id&& inner join &&OrganizationItem&& coi on coi.&&Id&& = oi.&&ParentItem&& )
select oi.&&UserId&& from AllOrganizationItems aoi inner join &&OrganizationItem&& oi on aoi.&&Id&& = oi.&&Id&& where oi.&&UserId&& is not null
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetUserSubordinate
procedure.text:
-- список подчиненных для пользователя create or replace function GetUserSubordinate(&&Uid&& bigint) returns table (&&UserId&& bigint)
as $$
-- отделы подчиненные пользователю with recursive AllOrganizationItems as ( -- отделы где является непосредственным начальником select oi.&&Id&&, oi.&&UserId&&, 1 &&Flag&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi where oi.&&UserId&& = $1 union select oi.&&Id&&, oiu.&&UserId&&, 0 from &&OrganizationItem&& oi left join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& oiu on oiu.&&OrganizationItemId&&=oi.&&Id&& where oiu.&&UserId&& = $1 union all -- подчиненные отделы select oi.&&Id&&, oi.&&UserId&&, 1 from &&OrganizationItem&& oi inner join AllOrganizationItems aoi on oi.&&ParentItem&& = aoi.&&Id&& )
-- начальники всех отделов select aoi.&&UserId&& from AllOrganizationItems aoi where aoi.&&UserId&& != $1 union select oim.&&UserId&& from AllOrganizationItems aoi inner join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& oim on oim.&&OrganizationItemId&& = aoi.&&Id&& and aoi.&&Flag&& = 1 where oim.&&UserId&& != $1
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: FillUserSecuritySetCacheTest
SplitString
GetOrgItemsChilds
procedure.text: create or replace function GetOrgItemsChilds(&&StartItemIds&& text) returns table (&&OrgItemId&& bigint) as $$ select ussc1.&&OrgItemId&& as OrgItemId from &&UserSecuritySetCache&& ussc inner join SplitString($1, ',') ss on cast(ss.&&Val&& as bigint) = ussc.&&OrgItemId&& and ussc.&&UserCount&& > 0 inner join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& ussc1 on ussc1.&&UserId&& = ussc.&&UserId&& where ussc1.&&OrgItemId&& is not null group by ussc1.&&OrgItemId&& $$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetDepartments
procedure.text:
-- список вхождений элементов оргструктуры в отделы create or replace function GetDepartments() returns table (&&Id&& bigint, &&UserId&& bigint, &&DepartmentId&& bigint)
as $$
-- для отделов все поддерево, для должностей и групп только сами элементы with recursive AllOrganizationItems as ( -- все элементы оргструктуры select oi.&&Id&&, oi.&&UserId&&, oi.&&ItemType&&, oi.&&Id&& &&DepartmentId&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi union all -- подчиненные элементы оргструктуры для родительского отдела select oi.&&Id&&, oi.&&UserId&&, aoi.&&ItemType&&, aoi.&&DepartmentId&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi inner join AllOrganizationItems aoi on oi.&&ParentItem&& = aoi.&&Id&& and aoi.&&ItemType&&=0 ) select &&Id&&, &&UserId&&, &&DepartmentId&& from AllOrganizationItems
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetDepartmentsUsers
procedure.text:
-- список пользователей для элементов оргструктуры create or replace function GetDepartmentsUsers() returns table (&&Id&& bigint, &&UserId&& bigint, &&UserCount&& int)
as $$
with AllOrganizationItems as (select * from GetDepartments())
select &&Id&&, &&UserId&&, cast(&&UserCount&& as int) &&UserCount&& from ( select &&Id&&, &&UserId&&, count(*) &&UserCount&& from ( -- начальники отделов select aoi.DepartmentId &&Id&&, aoi.&&UserId&&, aoi.&&DepartmentId&& oiId from AllOrganizationItems aoi where aoi.&&UserId&& is not null union all -- сотрудники отделов select aoi.&&DepartmentId&&, oim.&&UserId&&, aoi.&&Id&& from AllOrganizationItems aoi inner join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& oim on oim.&&OrganizationItemId&& = aoi.&&Id&& ) s group by &&Id&&, &&UserId&& ) si $$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetGroups
procedure.text:
-- список вхождения групп в группы create or replace function GetGroups() returns table(&&ParentGroupId&& bigint, &&ChildGroupId&& bigint)
as $$
with recursive AllGroups as ( select g.&&Id&& &&ParentGroupId&&, g.&&Id&& &&ChildGroupId&& from &&UserGroup&& g union all select gm.&&ChildId&&, ag.&&ChildGroupId&& from UserGroup_Groups_Map gm inner join AllGroups ag on ag.&&ParentGroupId&& = gm.&&ParentId&& )
select &&ParentGroupId&&, &&ChildGroupId&& from AllGroups
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetGroupsUsers
procedure.text:
-- список пользователей для группы (с количеством вхождений в группу) create or replace function GetGroupsUsers() returns table (&&GroupId&& bigint, &&UserId&& bigint, &&UserCount&& int)
as $$
with AllGroups as (select * from GetGroups())
select &&GroupId&&, &&UserId&&, cast(&&UserCount&& as int) &&UserCount&& from ( select &&GroupId&&, &&UserId&&, sum(&&UserCount&&) &&UserCount&& from ( select ag.&&ParentGroupId&& gId, null oiId, ag.&&ChildGroupId&& as &&GroupId&&, ugm.&&UserId&& as &&UserId&&, 1 &&UserCount&& from AllGroups ag inner join UserGroup_User_Map ugm on ugm.&&GroupId&& = ag.&&ParentGroupId&& union select ag.&&ParentGroupId&&, oim.&&OrgItemId&&, ag.&&ChildGroupId&&, oi.&&UserId&&, oi.&&UserCount&& from AllGroups ag inner join UserGroup_OrgItem_Map oim on oim.&&GroupId&& = ag.&&ParentGroupId&& inner join &&UserSecuritySetCacheTemp&& oi on oim.&&OrgItemId&& = oi.&&OrgItemId&& and oi.&&Subordinate&& = 0 ) s group by &&GroupId&&, &&UserId&& ) si
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: FillUserSecuritySetCache
UpdateUserSecuritySetCache

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select u.&&UserId&& from &&GroupPermissions&& gp inner join lateral GetGroupUsers(gp.&&GroupId&&) u on 1 = 1 where &&PermissionId&& = :PermissionId

procedure.name: UpsertActiveUserSession
